name: io.github.Kubis010/linkedin-mcp-server-salesbot
title: LinkedIn MCP Server (Salesbot)
description: AI-assisted, human-in-the-loop tool for managing professional LinkedIn relationships: research and organize contacts, draft highly personalized messages for human review and approval, sync inbox conversations, enrich profiles, and track everything in a built-in sales CRM — configurable pipeline stages, notes, tasks and custom fields. Built-in daily/hourly safety thresholds, mandatory approval flow, and prompt-injection defense keep activity within LinkedIn's safe limits — designed for targeted, meaningful outreach, not bulk messaging.

headers.name: x-mcp-api-key
headers.description: Your long-lived Salesbot MCP API key (sb_mcp_…), created in the app under Settings → MCP.
